sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n61704" key="la/kafqon" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λάκαφθον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n61704.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">an aromatic bark</tr_>, an ingredient of the Egypt. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κῦφι</foreign>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:7:22" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.22</biblScope></bibl>. (Perh. <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">νάρκαφθον</ref></xr>.)</sense> </entryFree>
